ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "tripduration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trip */,
  "starttime" TEXT /* Start time of the trip */,
  "stoptime" TEXT /* End time of the trip */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting station */,
  "start_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the starting station */,
  "start_station_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the starting station */,
  "start_station_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the starting station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ending station */,
  "end_station_name" TEXT /* Name of the ending station */,
  "end_station_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the ending station */,
  "end_station_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the ending station */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Bike ID used for the trip */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* User type (Subscriber or Casual) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Calculated age of the user */,
  "trip_type" TEXT /* Type of trip (e.g., one-way, round-trip, subscription-based) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trip */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the trip */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bike station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bike station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total bike capacity of the station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the bike station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the bike station */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the bike station */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the bike station */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the bike station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model or type of the bike */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (available, in use, out of service) */,
  "maintenance_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the bike needs maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bike */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the bike */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the bike */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (Subscriber or Casual) */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Calculated age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "income" TEXT /* Income range of the user */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date maintenance was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance work done */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the maintenance (completed, pending) */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the statistics record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike for which stats are recorded */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips taken on this bike */,
  "total_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered by this bike during trips */,
  "average_trip_duration" REAL /* Average duration of trips taken with this bike */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of this bike */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by this bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_stats_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the summary record */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip associated with this summary */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the trip in seconds */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the start station */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the end station */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the trip */,
  "trip_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the trip (e.g., commute, leisure) */,
  "trip_route" TEXT /* Route taken for the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_summary_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_summary_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_summary_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., trip start, trip end, bike maintenance) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who holds the subscription */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the subscription */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the subscription */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription is set to auto-renew */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
